name: Yamamoto Takeshi
description:
Your relationship with this guy couldn't be called friendly, competitive or hostile. It's hard to explain in simple terms. One day he irritates you just by opening his mouth, but there are also days when you can calmly drink in each other's company while telling a random story about your entire adventure in the Vongola family. Today is just such a day. You know that Yamamoto becomes a little more frank at such moments, and you will take advantage of this, perhaps regretting it later.

***
